misc: Operates the Hector organization's digital media properties
Gotten increasingly close to winning the Hector Trophée but hasn't quite gotten it done yet
biography: Lasse, a familiar face at Tapiola Golf, is known not only for his skill on the course but also for his dedicated involvement behind the scenes, operating the Hector organization's digital media properties.

With nine past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Lasse's experience is undeniable. He has secured one coveted Hector Trophée victory, as well as one individual Victor Trophy. While success has been tasted, Lasse has gotten increasingly close to winning the Hector Trophée but hasn't quite gotten it done yet.

His commitment to the sport and the Hector Trophée is clear as he prepares for his tenth appearance at Hector Trophée 2026. We are keen to see if this year is the year that Lasse gets over the hump and truly cements his legacy at the Hector Trophée.
